items.description: We will likely have more lawyers in the future than today, because: 1) AI will cause so many more people to ask legal questions which will encourage them to need to verify or execute through an actual lawyer. 2) AI will cause an explosion…

items.title: If your memory dies when your harness dies, you built the harness too thick.
items.title_zh: 如果你的记忆随着安全带的消失而消失，那么你的安全带就太厚了。
items.description: If your memory dies when your harness dies, you built the harness too thick. Memory is markdown. Skills are markdown. Brain is a git repo. The harness is a thin conductor — it reads the files, it doesn't own them. https://t.co/JPjnu2FhV6
items.description_zh: 如果你的记忆随着安全带的消失而消失，那么你的安全带就太厚了。记忆是降价的。技能是降价的。 Brain 是一个 git 仓库。线束是一根细导体——它读取文件，但并不拥有它们。 https://t.co/JPjnu2FhV6

items.title: Human communication will be for
items.description: Human communication will be for - deciding what to work on & what "good" looks like - keeping each other company & preventing loneliness/establishing camaraderie - creative brainstorming & bouncing ideas off each other Not for…

items.title: Harnesses can now been plugins
items.description: Harnesses can now been plugins - meaning it'd be trivial to replace the default Pi harness with e.g. Anthropic’s SDK or another custom one. This won't magically allow Claude subscription, but it's useful to compare different implementation…
items.description_zh: 线束现在可以是插件 - 这意味着将默认的 Pi 线束替换为例如Anthropic 的 SDK 或其他自定义 SDK。这不会神奇地允许 Claude 订阅，但比较不同的实现很有用......
